parameters.content:
## Weekly Meeting Hours Report — Fireflies + Google Sheets + Gmail

For team leads, operations managers, and founders who want an automatic weekly summary of all meeting activity from Fireflies. Every Friday at 5PM the workflow pulls the last 7 days of transcripts, calculates seven meeting metrics, logs one summary row to Google Sheets for trend tracking, and emails a formatted report to your manager inbox.

## How it works
- **1. Schedule — Every Friday 5PM** triggers the workflow automatically each week
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores your Fireflies API key, Google Sheet ID, recipient email, sender name, and company name
- **3. HTTP — Fetch Transcripts** pulls the 100 most recent Fireflies transcripts for filtering
- **4. Code — Calculate Meeting Metrics** filters to the past 7 days and calculates total meetings, total hours, average duration, busiest day, top participant, longest meeting, a day-by-day breakdown, and a numbered meeting list
- **5. IF — Meetings Found?** stops cleanly if no meetings were recorded this week
- **6. Google Sheets — Log Weekly Summary** appends one summary row per week to the tracker sheet
- **7. Gmail — Send Weekly Report** sends a formatted plain-text email with all metrics, daily breakdown, and full meeting list

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace YOUR_FIREFLIES_API_KEY, YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID, sheet tab name, manager email address, sender name, and company name
2. In **6. Google Sheets — Log Weekly Summary** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
3. In **7. Gmail — Send Weekly Report** — connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential using the account you want to send from
4. Create a Google Sheet tab named Weekly Meeting Report with columns: Week, Total Meetings, Total Hours, Avg Duration (min), Busiest Day, Top Participant, Longest Meeting, All Participants, Logged At
5. Activate the workflow — it runs every Friday at 5PM automatically

nodes.name: Section — Schedule, Config, and Transcript Fetch

parameters.content:
## Schedule, Config, and Transcript Fetch
Workflow triggers every Friday at 5PM. Config stores all credentials and report settings. HTTP fetches the 100 most recent Fireflies transcripts for the 7-day filter.

## Metrics Calculation and Gate
Filters transcripts to the past 7 days. Calculates total meetings, hours, average duration, busiest day, top participant, longest meeting, daily breakdown, and full meeting list. If no meetings found this week, exits cleanly via the Set node below.

nodes.name: Section — Weekly Log and Email Report

parameters.content:
## Weekly Log and Email Report
Google Sheets logs one summary row per week for trend tracking. Gmail sends a formatted plain-text report with all metrics, day-by-day breakdown, and numbered meeting list to the manager email.

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: =No meetings found in Fireflies for {{ $json.weekStart }} to {{ $json.weekEnd }}. No report sent.
